meta.title: Dawrak | AI Game Connect
meta.description: Preview Dawrak, the AI Game Connect assistant being built to help players manage real-life game requests, venue details, rankings, and rewards.

hero.title: Dawrak is your AI assistant for real-life play.
hero.body: Dawrak is being built to help players request games, receive updates, discover approved venues, and follow rankings and rewards more easily.

messages.text: Tell me what you want to play, where, and when.
Padel in New Cairo this weekend.
I can help prepare a request and show approved venue options when live.

sections.title: One assistant for the practical parts of real-life play.
sections.body: Dawrak keeps the experience focused on clear requests, approved places, and useful updates.

items.title: Request a game
items.body: Describe the activity, area, preferred time, and skill level.

items.title: Receive requests
items.body: Hear about players looking for the same kind of match.

items.title: Find approved places
items.body: Get venue, field, or court details before confirmation.

items.title: Follow times
items.body: Receive dates and times for future competitions.

items.title: Track rank movement
items.body: See ranking movement after verified participation.

items.title: Receive reward updates
items.body: Get notified when badges and offers become available.

sections.title: Dawrak is being built to help players manage requests and updates more easily.
sections.body: The flow is preview-only and does not create real matches from this website.

items.title: Share activity
items.body: Pick Football, Padel, Chess, PlayStation, Board games, Dominoes, or another safe activity.

items.title: Share area
items.body: Choose the city or area where you want to play.

items.title: Review options
items.body: See approved places and future request matches when available.

items.title: Confirm later
items.body: Final confirmation will happen only after real tools are connected.

sections.title: Helpful updates without pretending the system is live.
sections.body: Dawrak notifications shown here are examples of planned behavior.

items.title: Game request update
items.body: A future update when players are looking for the same activity.

items.title: Competition reminder
items.body: A future reminder for dates, times, and approved venue details.

items.title: Reward notification
items.body: A future alert when rewards or badges become available.

sections.title: Approved locations stay central to the experience.
sections.body: Dawrak is designed around clear venues, fields, courts, and rules.

items.title: Location clarity
items.body: Players should know where they are going before confirming.

items.title: Approved places
items.body: Only reviewed venues, fields, and courts belong in the ecosystem.

items.title: Clear rules
items.body: Times, locations, and activity standards should be easy to understand.

sections.title: Know when your activity starts to matter.
sections.body: Future Dawrak updates can make ranking movement and reward eligibility easier to follow.

items.title: Badge unlocks
items.body: Future badges for consistency, fair play, and activity.

items.title: Reward offers
items.body: Partner and venue updates when rewards launch.

sections.title: A frontend mockup only, no real backend.
sections.body: This preview shows the intended tone and flow without live chat logic.

messages.text: What would you like to play?
When live, I can help prepare the request, suggest approved places, and send updates.

sections.title: Dawrak supports clear and approved play only.
sections.body: The assistant concept follows the same safety standards as the platform.

sections.title: Register for early Dawrak access.
sections.body: Join as a player or venue partner now and receive updates as Dawrak features become available.

sections.title: Dawrak preview questions.
sections.body: Clear answers about what is planned and what is not live yet.
